profile.publicLead: Your name is shown in the sidebar and across workspaces you join.
profile.emailLead: Used to sign in and receive security notifications.
profile.emailChangeSoon: Email change with verification will be available in v0.3.
profile.dangerLead: Permanently delete your personal account. This does not delete any workspace you own — manage workspaces separately.
profile.deleteSoon: Account deletion will be available in v0.3.

deleteDialog.title: Delete account
deleteDialog.description: This permanently deletes your personal account and signs you out. Workspaces you own are not deleted — transfer ownership first.
deleteDialog.emailMismatch: Enter your account email exactly as shown.

security.passwordLead: Re-enter your current password before setting a new one.
security.twoFactorLead: Add an authenticator app for an extra layer of security.
security.twoFactorSoon: TOTP setup will be available in v0.3.
security.connectedLead: Link Google or GitHub for passwordless sign-in (coming soon).

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.lead: Devices and browsers signed in to your account. Revoke any session you do not recognize.
sessions.footerLead: Sign out of all other devices while keeping this session active.
sessions.signedOutOthers: Signed out of all other sessions.
